LanguageData.NCL_Mech_Scutiger.label: Scutiger Shieldbearer
LanguageData.NCL_Mech_Scutiger.description:
Unit Archive: NCL-12 "Scutiger Shieldbearer" Origin: NCL "Iron Law" Heavy Support Series
This heavy mechanoid functions as a mobile shield platform, deliberately devoid of offensive weaponry. Core defense relies on integrated heavy-energy barriers capable of neutralizing diverse ballistic threats.
Primary functionality involves manufacturing shield drones in situ by consuming pre-loaded steel reserves (50 units per drone). These autonomous units feature compact barrier projectors with distinct operational parameters: ◆ Fragile chassis but exceptional shield efficiency ◆ Provides energy protection for self and allied units ◆ Automatically forms defensive perimeter around host when not threatened ◆ Delivers immediate shield reinforcement to frontline units during combat
All manufactured drones maintain dynamic defensive formations around the host unit during standby operations.
